title: Mathematical Analysis of a Recursive Algorithm
description: A flowchart illustrating the recursive decomposition of a problem and the subsequent construction of a recurrence relation to model its time complexity.
relationships: Algorithm execution flows from the initial call to a base case check; if the base case is true, the base case operation is performed and a result is returned; if false, the recursive case operation is performed, which includes making one or more recursive sub-calls with smaller inputs; the results of these sub-calls are combined to form the final result returned from the original call.
